statement: The finite augmented repair forms descend to a well-defined closed quadratic form D_aug on the transported quotient trace space X_aug.

traceQuotientCompatibilityInputStatus.label: trace quotient compatibility input
traceQuotientCompatibilityInputStatus.reason: Finite trace quotient norms converge to the transported quotient norm on X_aug.

traceRepairDescendsStatus.label: trace repair descends to X_aug
traceRepairDescendsStatus.reason: Quotient compatibility identifies finite trace coordinates modulo the null fiber, so the finite repairs have a single closed transported trace-space limit.

proof: Use quotient compatibility to identify the finite trace quotients with X_aug.
Transport the finite repair forms through those quotient coordinates.
The identified quotient topology gives a unique closed limit form D_aug.
